blockers.finding: Readable simulator evidence proves build/install/launch and a single first-screen screenshot only. It does not provide runtime readback for PM-required create, edit, delete, save-failure, Premium, App Intent/manual fallback, or relaunch paths.
blockers.expected_fix: Produce fresh Xcode/Simulator runtime evidence for the complete PM normal flow: first-launch Swirl Wall, Scent Color Setup creation, Swirl Path Sketcher edit/save, detail, delete confirmation, save-failure recovery, Premium entry/fallback, and App Intent/manual fallback. Update rough_app_build/self-check refs to the new readable artifacts.
required_evidence: fresh simulator install/launch log with bundle id, git HEAD, and timestamp
UI walkthrough log, accessibility snapshot, video, or screenshot set covering each PM-required path
updated rough_app_build.json and evidence ledger refs from the current source commit
Xcode/Simulator evidence, not SwiftPM-only or source-only proof

blockers.finding: Source and unit tests implement JSON save/reload, but the evidence set lacks simulator save/terminate/relaunch/readback proof for a user-created soap swirl sketch.
blockers.expected_fix: Run and record a simulator persistence acceptance path that creates and saves a named user sketch, terminates/relaunches the app, and reads the same sketch back on Swirl Wall/detail. Keep unit tests as supporting evidence only.
required_evidence: simulator walkthrough/readback showing the same saved title/id before and after relaunch
targeted persistence test still passing
runtime log or snapshots tied to current git HEAD
updated evidence ledger/runtime refs

blockers.finding: PM requires StoreKit 2 Premium local packs. Source calls StoreKit APIs for com.soapswirl.studio.premium.localpacks, but no tracked .storekit configuration or equivalent IAP smoke/readback evidence exists.
blockers.expected_fix: Add tracked StoreKit testing configuration or equivalent App Store Connect/IAP smoke evidence for the Premium product id, wire it into the scheme if using local StoreKit testing, and prove Premium remains non-blocking for base creation.
required_evidence: tracked .storekit file or equivalent IAP configuration/readback for com.soapswirl.studio.premium.localpacks
xcodebuild/simulator StoreKit smoke evidence for product lookup and purchase/restore/unavailable fallback
runtime evidence that base Scent Color Setup and Swirl Path Sketcher remain free
updated package manifest/ledger refs

problem_source_refs: /Users/wangrenzhu/.local/state/app-factory-command-center/agent_gateway/jobs/codex-factory-control-singleton/PMAgent/product_goal_bundles/goal-010-soapswirl-studio/package_goal_map.md:App Store Review / 隐私 / HIG 边界
blockers.finding: The app has a local privacy note and PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy, but no reachable Privacy Policy/User Agreement or release metadata legal surface for the PM App Store-ready/privacy target.
blockers.expected_fix: Add release-ready en-US legal/privacy surfaces for the local-only/no-tracking model and make them reachable from app UI or release metadata without adding unrequested tracking, backend, photos, subscriptions, or credits.
required_evidence: source refs for reachable Privacy Policy and/or User Agreement surface or metadata refs
runtime screenshot/accessibility evidence showing the legal/privacy entry is reachable
PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy readback remains aligned with no tracking/no collected data
App Store metadata/readiness refs in en-US

blockers.finding: Evidence is Debug simulator build/test/install/launch only. PM target requires App Store-ready SwiftUI with privacy, StoreKit Premium, en-US, and acceptance refs; no archive/export, release-readiness report, signing-limitation statement, ios-compliance, or ios-iap acceptance evidence is present.
blockers.expected_fix: Produce release-readiness evidence or an explicit signing-limitation release-readiness report: Release configuration build/archive attempt, version/build/bundle-id readback, privacy/IAP metadata checks, and ios-compliance/ios-iap acceptance refs.
required_evidence: Release configuration build/archive/export proof or signed-limitation report with exact blocker if signing is unavailable
version/build/bundle identifier readback matching PM/release target
ios-compliance and ios-iap acceptance refs
updated rough_app_build.json with release readiness refs

final_gate_checks.rationale: No tracked generated build/cache artifacts or tracked temp files were found; untracked build/.DS_Store and prior verdict drafts are not counted as tracked hygiene blockers.
Source implements create/edit/save/delete and does not appear static/sample-only, but runtime coverage is missing.
Normal launch screen visibly renders handmade soap loaf, swirl path, and cut-face preview slots required by REQ-VIS-001.
No PM document explicitly requires photos/media attachment, ATT/tracking, consumable credits, or five-tab IA; no blockers were generated for those capabilities.

requirement_results.rationale: Create/edit/delete source exists and tests support storage, but complete simulator UI runtime path evidence is missing.
Persistence source/tests pass, but no simulator relaunch readback evidence proves persistence in app runtime.
Runtime screenshot shows handmade soap loaf, swirl path, and cut-face preview in normal UI.
Soap-specific empty state source exists; screenshot does not scroll/read back the empty card itself.
Save failure recovery source/test exists but lacks simulator path evidence.
Local privacy copy and manifest align, but release legal/privacy surface evidence is missing.
Premium source preserves free base creation, but StoreKit config/IAP smoke evidence is missing.
On-device/system-assisted draft suggestions are editable/skippable/user-confirmed; PM does not require cloud AI or chat.
App Intent compiles and has a unit-tested draft fallback, but runtime invocation/manual fallback evidence is absent.
Visible copy and package metadata are en-US; screenshot shows en-US marker.

deductions.rationale: Readable simulator evidence proves build/install/launch and a single first-screen screenshot only. It does not provide runtime readback for PM-required create, edit, delete, save-failure, Premium, App Intent/manual fallback, or relaunch paths.
Source and unit tests implement JSON save/reload, but the evidence set lacks simulator save/terminate/relaunch/readback proof for a user-created soap swirl sketch.

PM requires StoreKit 2 Premium local packs. Source calls StoreKit APIs for com.soapswirl.studio.premium.localpacks, but no tracked .storekit configuration or equivalent IAP smoke/readback evidence exists.
The app has a local privacy note and PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy, but no reachable Privacy Policy/User Agreement or release metadata legal surface for the PM App Store-ready/privacy target.

Evidence is Debug simulator build/test/install/launch only. PM target requires App Store-ready SwiftUI with privacy, StoreKit Premium, en-US, and acceptance refs; no archive/export, release-readiness report, signing-limitation statement, ios-compliance, or ios-iap acceptance evidence is present.

conditional_capability_decisions.rationale: PM bundle requires StoreKit 2 Premium local packs, App Intent quick capture, local persistence, visual slots, privacy/en-US, and App Store readiness; it does not explicitly require photos/media attachment, ATT, consumable credits, or five-tab IA.
